In DP Attention, when some DP ranks have no actual requests, they enter IDLE mode. After prepare_mlp_sync_batch, these IDLE batches are padded (batch_size > 0) to participate in MLP sync. However, fo

sglang.title: Piecewise Cuda Graph Memory Usage
sglang.author: Oasis-Git
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Memory Components
We decompose GPU memory usage into three components:


Non-Torch Memory
GPU memory not managed by PyTorch’s CUDA caching allocator. For Piecewise CUDA Graph (PCG), this mainly corresponds to CUDA Graph metadata and runtime bookkeeping.


Torch Dynamic Pool Memory
Memory

sglang.title: [MTP][spec_v2] Fix TRTLLM MLA backend crash in EAGLE draft_extend mode
sglang.author: YAMY1234
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix a crash in TRTLLM MLA backend during EAGLE speculative decoding in draft_extend mode when sequences have varying accept_length values.
This can be reproduced by the following agg command (and also intermittency issues in the disagg setup in benchmark section):
SGLANG_ENABLE_SPEC_V2=1

sglang.title: diffusion: Fix LoRA weight merging when using layerwise offload
sglang.author: niehen6174
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When using layerwise offload strategy, offloaded layers only keep placeholder weights on GPU while the actual weights are stored on CPU. This prevents LoRA from reading the real weights and merging them correctly, causing LoRA operations to fail.
Modifications

Add l

Purpose
This pull request improves the efficiency of sliding window attention in the 3D kernel by applying the same optimization used in the 2D kernel. It ensures that only tiles within the defined window are processed, resulting in better performance and reduced computational overhead.
Performance

Currently the default BLOCK_SIZE_N is 64, see here
For shrink, rank is N. offs_bn is computed using mod here. If N is smaller than BLOCK_SIZE_N, offs_bn will be repeated. This will make lora weights being loaded repeated he

vllm.title: fused_moe_kernel - cast accumulator after applying router weights
vllm.author: gnovack
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The tests/lora/test_olmoe_tp.py test_olmoe_lora_mixed test case has been failing since #31676 was merged. Previously the application of moe_weight (router weights) to the accumulator was performed in float32, but after #31676, this computation is now done after accumulator has been cast to c

vllm.title: [BugFix] scheduler: Fix resuming of preempted requests after async load
vllm.author: orozery
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The correct flow is for resuming preempted requests is:
RequestStatus.PREEMTPED -> resumed req in SchedulerOutput
However, for requests going through async loading after preemption this becomes:
RequestStatus.PREEMTPED -> RequestStatus.WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS -> RequestStatus.WAITING
then, the schedu

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #31599.
When using AWQ-Marlin quantization (specifically with VLLM_MARLIN_INPUT_DTYPE=int8) for models employing MLA (Multi-Head Latent Attention) like DeepSeek-V2/V3/R1, the input tensor to per_token_quant_int8 can become non-contiguous during long-context processing (>16k tokens). Th

vllm.title: [MISC] Add strict contiguity check for FlashInfer attention tensors
vllm.author: vadiklyutiy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Early check of potential error as in #30842. See also #31617, flashinfer-ai/flashinfer#2232
Updates FlashInfer attention path to use stricter contiguous check, preventing potential CUDA kernel memory access issues.
Introduces is_strictly_contiguous() utility to detect tensors with degenerate strides

vllm.title: [BugFix] Wait for compute before offloading KV to CPU
vllm.author: orozery
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the OffloadingConnector to wait on the default (compute) stream, before offloading KV data from the GPU to the CPU.
Additionally, we move the offloading to start at the beginning of the next engine step. This is to avoid contention with sample_tokens which also involves gpu->cpu copies

Purpose
Use spline interpolation to search for the maximum QPS that barely satisfies the SLA requirements. Compared to the previous algorithm that adopts a two-stage approach (scanning min/max boundaries before applying binary search), the new algorithm only has one stage and converges faster especi

Adds StructuredOutputsWorker to apply grammar bitmasks in-place on logits using a new Triton kernel that maps bitmasks to specific logits via logits_indices
